hooks.command: pwsh -Command "$input = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $input.command; if ($cmd -match 'npm test|jest|vitest') { Write-Output ('Filtrage auto: ' + $cmd + ' | tail -20 errors only'); $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT = ($input | Add-Member -NotePropertyName 'command' -NotePropertyValue ($cmd + ' 2>&1 | Select-String FAIL,ERROR,✗ | Select-Object -First 30') -PassThru -Force | ConvertTo-Json) } elseif ($cmd -match 'npm install|pip install') { Write-Output 'Filtrage auto: affichage erreurs uniquement'; $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT = ($input | Add-Member -NotePropertyName 'command' -NotePropertyValue ($cmd + ' 2>&1 | Select-String ERR,error,Successfully') -PassThru -Force | ConvertTo-Json) }"

pwsh -Command "$output = $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_OUTPUT; if ($output.Length -gt 5000) { Write-Warning ('⚠️ Sortie volumineuse détectée (' + $output.Length + ' chars). Envisage /delegation-isolee pour cette tâche.') }"
